title: Hotel Review: Courtyard San Francisco Downtown/Van Ness Ave - The Bulkhead Seat
content: # Hotel Review: Courtyard San Francisco Downtown/Van Ness Ave. Courtyard SF Van Ness 1. Advertiser & Editorial Disclosure: The Bulkhead Seat earns an affiliate commission for anyone approved through the links below. I had to be in San Francisco overnight this past week and hotel rates were astronomical. All of my regular haunts were north of $1,000 for the night. I settled on the Courtyard San Francisco Downtown/Van Ness Ave and might have just found one of the nicest Courtyard properties out there. The design was funky and fun with a modern lobby, snacks, and friendly service. Courtyard San Francisco Downtown/Van Ness Ave. **Anthony’s Take:** I was struck by how nice the property is the moment I walked in the door. The hotel has a modern and funky lobby with fun art and a design that makes you want to stick around. The staff was friendly throughout my stay and while there were no suites available, the room I had worked for the short time I was there.

title: Courtyard San Francisco Union Square Reviews - Trip.com
content: As a branded hotel, the facilities are reliable; the water pressure is good, the ceilings are high, and the bedding is comfortable, making for a pleasant stay.
